## What Changed

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore

## Validation

- [ ] Contracts compile
- [ ] Frontend builds
- [ ] Tests pass (if applicable)

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets added
- [ ] No private keys committed
- [ ] Env handling unchanged or documented

## Additional Notes

Links, screenshots, or deployment notes.
